description: Create a chapter divider slide for the Data and AI section with a large visual title on the left and explanatory text on the right.

header.headline: Data and AI
header.sub: The evolution of AI is transforming numerous industries. The rise of GenAI has caused many organizations to rethink their AI investment strategies with a view to accelerating and building on their experience with machine learning (ML). Financial services companies have always been quick to embrace new technologies. As such, 92 percent of financial services companies in the KPMG Global Tech Report research indicated their AI investments have generated profits over the last 24 months, compared with a cross-sector average of 88 percent.

footer.source: World Economic Forum, “Transforming Paradigms: A Global AI in Financial Services Survey” (January 2020).
